isi.lyrics:
Lyric STAYC - 반칙(Honestly)

Romanization

jakku geureomyeon neo miwo
wae moreun cheokhae aljana that I want you

neul naman honja aswiwo
Cuz u always be playing that game,
it ain’t fair eotteokhae nan

I’m confused, soljikhaejyeo bwa
How u got me fooled

Don’t lie, cheokhaji ma
tto nareul aetageman hae
da almyeonseo wae geurae

Oh I think about u
ne mamdo nawa gatdamyeon
just hold my hand

Oh say that u want me
Baby show me that u love me too
banchik eopsi, honestly

heundeulji ma, banchigiya
nun gamado jami an wa, dreaming of u

chiteukiga ne teukgiya
ne numbit, maltu, jeombu da
make my heart go up n down

I love u, chimyeongjeogiya
Wow you got me good

Oh my, don’t turn around
simjangi teojil geot gata
nal michige hajana

Oh I think about u
ne mamdo nawa gatdamyeon
just hold my hand

Oh say that u want me
Baby show me that u love me too
banchik eopsi, honestly

Ring the alarm (x2)
Give me a call whenever, babe
Saved u in favorite

geuman milgo danggyeojullae?
eochapi banchik, seon jom neomeodo okay
I never did quite understand the point of it all
So much more to come for us

Na na na na na na na na na
Na na na na na
Na na na na na na na na na
Na na na na na

Hangeul

자꾸 그러면 너 미워
왜 모른 척해 알잖아 that I want you

늘 나만 혼자 아쉬워
Cuz u always be playing that game,
it ain’t fair 어떡해 난

I’m confused, 솔직해져 봐
How u got me fooled

Don’t lie, 척하지 마
또 나를 애타게만 해
다 알면서 왜 그래

Oh I think about u
네 맘도 나와 같다면
just hold my hand

Oh say that u want me
Baby show me that u love me too
반칙 없이, honestly

흔들지 마, 반칙이야
눈 감아도 잠이 안 와, dreaming of u

치트키가 네 특기야
네 눈빛, 말투, 전부 다
make my heart go up n down

I love u, 치명적이야
Wow you got me good

Oh my, don’t turn around
심장이 터질 것 같아
날 미치게 하잖아

Oh I think about u
네 맘도 나와 같다면
just hold my hand

Oh say that u want me
Baby show me that u love me too
반칙 없이, honestly

Ring the alarm (x2)
Give me a call whenever, babe
Saved u in favorite

그만 밀고 당겨줄래?
어차피 반칙, 선 좀 넘어도 okay
I never did quite understand the point of it all
So much more to come for us

Na na na na na na na na na
Na na na na na
Na na na na na na na na na
Na na na na na

nadaum yuji Know what I mean?

daechung haedo dwae byeoril eopseul geoya
Good thing’s we ok (I WANT IT)
